label: Sub-district name
description: Readable name linking the kecamatan to its parent district.
notes: Per user choice for sub-district labels.

label: Parent district
description: Aceh district the kecamatan belongs to.
how_created: Assigned when distributing 276 kecamatans across 23 districts.
notes: Context only; regressions use kecamatan fixed effects.

label: Flooded dummy
description: 1 if the kecamatan was flooded by the tsunami.
how_created: 68 of 276 kecamatans set to flooded (Table 1 split).

label: Share of population flooded
description: Share of the kecamatan's population in flooded area (exogenous dose).
how_created: latent dose * 0.62 + noise (flooded only); GRUMP-population analogue.

label: Share of area flooded
description: Share of the kecamatan's physical area that was flooded (exogenous dose).
how_created: latent dose * 0.00566 + noise (flooded only); tiny mean -> ~+1.75 coefficient.

label: Flood-intensity quintile
description: Quintile (1-5) of the flooding-intensity distribution among flooded units.
how_created: qcut of the latent dose into 5 groups among flooded kecamatans; 0 for non-flooded.
notes: Only the top quintile shows a significant effect.

label: Area
description: Approximate land area of the kecamatan.
notes: Sets the number of night-light pixels.

label: Pixel count
description: Number of ~0.86 km^2 night-light grid cells in the kecamatan.
notes: 30x30 arc-second pixels ~ 0.86 km^2 at the equator.

label: Latitude
how_created: Parent Aceh district centroid + ~20 km jitter (flooded ones nudged seaward).
notes: Enables Conley spatial SEs at sub-district level.

label: DiD period
description: Event-time period for the staggered DiD dummies.

label: Average luminosity
description: Mean Digital Number (brightness) across the kecamatan's pixels.
how_created: nl_sum / n_pixels, top-coded at 63 (DMSP saturation). 2004 values match Table 1.

label: Summed luminosity
description: Sum of Digital Numbers over all pixels in the kecamatan.
notes: The unit-level activity measure underlying nl_log.

label: Log luminosity
description: log( sum of (DN + 0.001) ) -- the transformed regression variable.
how_created: Cumulated from the 2004 anchor using the nl_growth series.
notes: Matches the paper's log night-lights transform.

label: Night-lights growth
description: Annual growth rate of log night-lights (log difference).
